---
name: Documentation issue
about: Report unclear, missing, or incorrect documentation
title: "[Docs]: "
labels: ["documentation"]
assignees: []
---

## Page / file affected

Which document or section is this about? (e.g. `README.md` → Installation, `docs/architecture.md`)

## What is unclear or incorrect

Describe what is confusing, missing, or wrong.

## Suggested improvement

How would you fix or clarify it? A proposed rewrite is very welcome.

## Additional context

(Optional) Screenshots, links, or your experience level — this helps us write docs for the right audience.
